title: Hotbar Scrolling Sound
description: This client-sided mod for Fabric plays a small "tick" sound, when you switch to another slot in your Hotbar.
body:
**⚠️IMPORTANT⚠️** This mod requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).
**Mod Description** _Ever thought that when switching slots of your hot bar, a sound should play? Well, you came to the right place!_ **Hotbar Scrolling Sound** is a client-sided only Minecraft mod for the **Fabric Loader**, that plays a little "tick" sound, when switching slots of your hotbar. The mod is configurable with **2** commands that the mod adds: 1. /togglehotbarscrollingsound <**ENABLED**|**DISABLED**> 2. /hotbarsounds:scrollingvolume <**scrollingVolume**> (Min: 0.0, Max: 2.0) Example usage for command No.**1**:
/togglehotbarscrollingsound ENABLED
Example usage for command No.**2**:
/hotbarsounds:scrollingvolume 0.5
For reference of the mod, please play the **Mod Demonstration Video** below.
**Mod Demonstration Video**
**Why Download?** This mod plays a sound to the player when switching Hotbar slots, **which is a missing UI sound**. It also **increases the Q.O.L** (Quality of Life), of Minecraft.
**Donation** If you like my work, and would like support me, then please consider to donate **[here](https://paypal.com/paypalme/EdwardKhrabrov)** (or with another link on the side bar, under "Links").
